DMS_ProcessDocumentQuest.questDescriptio.li: questDescription->The Colonial Fleet has contacted you and plans to drop off a batch of complex, backlogged documents. You must assign personnel with suitable research capabilities to process them.\n\nIf any document is destroyed, the quest will immediately fail. Keep them safe.

LanguageData.DMS_ProcessDocumentQuest.root.nodes.6.te: Classified documents from [asker_nameFull] have arrived. They have been dropped near your trade beacons or colony center.
LanguageData.DMS_ProcessDocumentQuest.root.nodes.7.no: Because the documents were destroyed, the quest has failed.
LanguageData.DMS_ProcessDocumentQuest.root.nodes.10.n: You have successfully processed all fleet documents.
